initial_candidates.sql:
WITH q4_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        c.cust_city AS city,
        p.prod_id,
        p.prod_name,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS total_sales
    FROM sales s
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN products p ON s.prod_id = p.prod_id
    WHERE t.calendar_quarter_desc IN ('2019-Q4', '2020-Q4')
      AND s.promo_id IS NULL
      AND c.country_id IN (SELECT country_id FROM countries WHERE country_name = 'United States')
    GROUP BY c.cust_city, p.prod_id, p.prod_name, t.calendar_quarter_desc
),
city_q4_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        city,
        SUM(CASE WHEN calendar_quarter_desc = '2019-Q4' THEN total_sales ELSE 0 END) AS q4_2019_sales,
        SUM(CASE WHEN calendar_quarter_desc = '2020-Q4' THEN total_sales ELSE 0 END) AS q4_2020_sales
    FROM q4_sales qs
    JOIN times t ON qs.prod_id IN (SELECT prod_id FROM sales WHERE time_id = t.time_id) -- Ensure join
    GROUP BY city
),
filtered_cities AS (
    SELECT city
    FROM city_q4_totals
    WHERE q4_2019_sales > 0 
      AND (q4_2020_sales - q4_2019_sales) / q4_2019_sales >= 0.20
),
q4_city_product_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        c.cust_city AS city,
        p.prod_id,
        p.prod_name,
        t.calendar_quarter_desc,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS product_sales
    FROM sales s
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN products p ON s.prod_id = p.prod_id
    WHERE t.calendar_quarter_desc IN ('2019-Q4', '2020-Q4')
      AND s.promo_id IS NULL
      AND c.country_id IN (SELECT country_id FROM countries WHERE country_name = 'United States')
      AND c.cust_city IN (SELECT city FROM filtered_cities)
    GROUP BY c.cust_city, p.prod_id, p.prod_name, t.calendar_quarter_desc
),
city_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        city,
        calendar_quarter_desc,
        SUM(product_sales) AS city_total_sales
    FROM q4_city_product_sales
    GROUP BY city, calendar_quarter_desc
),
ranked_products AS (
    SELECT 
        q4_city_product_sales.prod_id,
        q4_city_product_sales.prod_name,
        q4_city_product_sales.calendar_quarter_desc,
        q4_city_product_sales.product_sales,
        city_totals.city_total_sales,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY q4_city_product_sales.calendar_quarter_desc ORDER BY q4_city_product_sales.product_sales DESC) AS prod_rank,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY q4_city_product_sales.calendar_quarter_desc) AS total_products
    FROM q4_city_product_sales
    JOIN city_totals 
        ON q4_city_product_sales.city = city_totals.city 
        AND q4_city_product_sales.calendar_quarter_desc = city_totals.calendar_quarter_desc
),
top_20_products AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT prod_id, prod_name
    FROM ranked_products
    WHERE prod_rank <= CEIL(total_products * 0.20)
),
product_sales_by_quarter AS (
    SELECT 
        p.prod_id,
        p.prod_name,
        t.calendar_quarter_desc,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS product_sales
    FROM sales s
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN products p ON s.prod_id = p.prod_id
    WHERE t.calendar_quarter_desc IN ('2019-Q4', '2020-Q4')
      AND s.promo_id IS NULL
      AND p.prod_id IN (SELECT prod_id FROM top_20_products)
      AND s.cust_id IN (SELECT cust_id FROM customers WHERE country_id IN (SELECT country_id FROM countries WHERE country_name = 'United States'))
    GROUP BY p.prod_id, p.prod_name, t.calendar_quarter_desc
),
product_total_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        prod_id,
        prod_name,
        SUM(CASE WHEN calendar_quarter_desc = '2019-Q4' THEN product_sales ELSE 0 END) AS q4_2019_sales,
        SUM(CASE WHEN calendar_quarter_desc = '2020-Q4' THEN product_sales ELSE 0 END) AS q4_2020_sales
    FROM product_sales_by_quarter
    GROUP BY prod_id, prod_name
),
city_q4_sales_by_product AS (
    SELECT 
        c.cust_city,
        p.prod_id,
        t.calendar_quarter_desc,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS product_sales
    FROM sales s
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN products p ON s.prod_id = p.prod_id
    WHERE t.calendar_quarter_desc IN ('2019-Q4', '2020-Q4')
      AND s.promo_id IS NULL
      AND p.prod_id IN (SELECT prod_id FROM top_20_products)
      AND c.country_id IN (SELECT country_id FROM countries WHERE country_name = 'United States')
    GROUP BY c.cust_city, p.prod_id, t.calendar_quarter_desc
),
city_total_sales_by_quarter AS (
    SELECT 
        cust_city,
        calendar_quarter_desc,
        SUM(product_sales) AS city_total_sales
    FROM city_q4_sales_by_product
    GROUP BY cust_city, calendar_quarter_desc
),
product_city_share AS (
    SELECT 
        cp.prod_id,
        cp.calendar_quarter_desc,
        SUM(cp.product_sales) / SUM(cts.city_total_sales) AS product_share
    FROM city_q4_sales_by_product cp
    JOIN city_total_sales_by_quarter cts 
        ON cp.cust_city = cts.cust_city 
        AND cp.calendar_quarter_desc = cts.calendar_quarter_desc
    GROUP BY cp.prod_id, cp.calendar_quarter_desc
),
product_share_diff AS (
    SELECT 
        pcs1.prod_id,
        p.prod_name,
        pcs2.product_share - pcs1.product_share AS share_diff
    FROM product_city_share pcs1
    JOIN product_city_share pcs2 
        ON pcs1.prod_id = pcs2.prod_id 
        AND pcs1.calendar_quarter_desc = '2019-Q4' 
        AND pcs2.calendar_quarter_desc = '2020-Q4'
    JOIN products p ON p.prod_id = pcs1.prod_id
)
SELECT 
    prod_id,
    prod_name,
    share_diff
FROM product_share_diff
ORDER BY share_diff DESC;

WITH 
  -- Get Q4 2019 and Q4 2020 sales excluding promotions
  q4_sales AS (
    SELECT 
      c.cust_city,
      p.prod_id,
      t.calendar_quarter_id,
      SUM(s.amount_sold) AS total_sales
    FROM sales s
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN products p ON s.prod_id = p.prod_id
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    WHERE t.calendar_quarter_id IN ('2019-Q4', '2020-Q4')
      AND s.promo_id IS NULL
    GROUP BY c.cust_city, p.prod_id, t.calendar_quarter_id
  ),
  
  -- Aggregate total sales per city for each quarter (excluding promotions)
  city_quarter_sales AS (
    SELECT 
      cust_city,
      calendar_quarter_id,
      SUM(total_sales) AS city_total_sales
    FROM q4_sales
    GROUP BY cust_city, calendar_quarter_id
  ),
  
  -- Compute growth rate for each city from Q4 2019 to Q4 2020
  city_growth AS (
    SELECT 
      c1.cust_city,
      c1.city_total_sales AS q4_2019_sales,
      c2.city_total_sales AS q4_2020_sales,
      CASE 
        WHEN c1.city_total_sales = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE (c2.city_total_sales - c1.city_total_sales) / c1.city_total_sales
      END AS growth_rate
    FROM city_quarter_sales c1
    LEFT JOIN city_quarter_sales c2 
      ON c1.cust_city = c2.cust_city AND c2.calendar_quarter_id = '2020-Q4'
    WHERE c1.calendar_quarter_id = '2019-Q4'
      AND c2.city_total_sales IS NOT NULL
      AND (c2.city_total_sales - c1.city_total_sales) / c1.city_total_sales >= 0.20
  ),
  
  -- Get sales per product in Q4 2019 and Q4 2020 for qualifying cities
  product_sales AS (
    SELECT 
      qs.cust_city,
      qs.prod_id,
      qs.calendar_quarter_id,
      qs.total_sales
    FROM q4_sales qs
    WHERE qs.cust_city IN (SELECT cust_city FROM city_growth)
  ),
  
  -- Compute city-level total sales per quarter (for share calculation)
  city_quarter_totals AS (
    SELECT 
      cust_city,
      calendar_quarter_id,
      SUM(total_sales) AS city_quarter_total
    FROM product_sales
    GROUP BY cust_city, calendar_quarter_id
  ),
  
  -- Compute product-level sales in each quarter for qualifying cities
  product_quarter_totals AS (
    SELECT 
      prod_id,
      calendar_quarter_id,
      SUM(total_sales) AS product_quarter_total
    FROM product_sales
    GROUP BY prod_id, calendar_quarter_id
  ),
  
  -- Combine to compute product sales per quarter
  product_shares AS (
    SELECT 
      pq.prod_id,
      pq.calendar_quarter_id,
      SUM(pq.total_sales) AS product_quarter_total,
      SUM(cqt.city_quarter_total) AS city_quarter_total
    FROM product_sales pq
    JOIN city_quarter_totals cqt 
      ON pq.cust_city = cqt.cust_city AND pq.calendar_quarter_id = cqt.calendar_quarter_id
    GROUP BY pq.prod_id, pq.calendar_quarter_id
  ),
  
  -- Compute share in Q4 2019 and Q4 2020 for each product
  product_shares_by_quarter AS (
    SELECT 
      prod_id,
      MAX(CASE WHEN calendar_quarter_id = '2019-Q4' THEN product_quarter_total * 1.0 / city_quarter_total END) AS share_2019,
      MAX(CASE WHEN calendar_quarter_id = '2020-Q4' THEN product_quarter_total * 1.0 / city_quarter_total END) AS share_2020
    FROM product_shares
    GROUP BY prod_id
  ),
  
  -- Filter to top 20% products by overall sales in Q4 2019 & 2020 (excluding promotions)
  -- Compute total sales per product across both quarters
  product_overall_sales AS (
    SELECT 
      prod_id,
      SUM(CASE WHEN calendar_quarter_id IN ('2019-Q4', '2020-Q4') THEN total_sales ELSE 0 END) AS overall_sales
    FROM product_sales
    GROUP BY prod_id
  ),
  
  -- Rank products by overall sales and select top 20%
  ranked_products AS (
    SELECT 
      prod_id,
      overall_sales,
      NTILE(5) OVER (ORDER BY overall_sales DESC) AS sales_quintile
    FROM product_overall_sales
  ),
  
  -- Join sales with top 20% products
  top_products AS (
    SELECT 
      ps.share_2019,
      ps.share_2020,
      ps.share_2020 - ps.share_2019 AS share_change
    FROM product_shares_by_quarter ps
    JOIN ranked_products rp ON ps.prod_id = rp.prod_id
    WHERE rp.sales_quintile = 1
  )
  
SELECT 
  share_2019,
  share_2020,
  share_change
FROM top_products
ORDER BY share_change DESC;

WITH q4_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        c.cust_city AS city,
        p.prod_id,
        p.prod_name,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS total_sales
    FROM sales s
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN products p ON s.prod_id = p.prod_id
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    WHERE s.promo_id IS NULL
      AND t.calendar_quarter_desc IN ('2019-Q4', '2020-Q4')
      AND c.country_id IN (
          SELECT country_id 
          FROM countries 
          WHERE country_name = 'United States'
      )
    GROUP BY c.cust_city, p.prod_id, p.prod_name, t.calendar_quarter_desc
),
q4_city_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        city,
        calendar_quarter_desc,
        SUM(total_sales) AS city_total_sales
    FROM q4_sales
    GROUP BY city, calendar_quarter_desc
),
city_growth AS (
    SELECT 
        q19.city,
        q19.city_total_sales AS q4_2019_sales,
        q20.city_total_sales AS q4_2020_sales,
        (q20.city_total_sales - q19.city_total_sales) / q19.city_total_sales AS growth_rate
    FROM q4_city_sales q19
    JOIN q4_city_sales q20 ON q19.city = q20.city
    WHERE q19.calendar_quarter_desc = '2019-Q4'
      AND q20.calendar_quarter_desc = '2020-Q4'
      AND (q20.city_total_sales - q19.city_total_sales) / q19.city_total_sales >= 0.20
),
filtered_city_products AS (
    SELECT 
        qs.city,
        qs.prod_id,
        qs.prod_name,
        qs.total_sales,
        qs.calendar_quarter_desc
    FROM q4_sales qs
    WHERE qs.city IN (SELECT city FROM city_growth)
),
product_ranking AS (
    SELECT 
        prod_id,
        prod_name,
        SUM(CASE WHEN calendar_quarter_desc = '2019-Q4' THEN total_sales ELSE 0 END) AS q4_2019_sales,
        SUM(CASE WHEN calendar_quarter_desc = '2020-Q4' THEN total_sales ELSE 0 END) AS q4_2020_sales,
        SUM(total_sales) AS overall_sales
    FROM filtered_city_products
    GROUP BY prod_id, prod_name
),
top_products AS (
    SELECT 
        prod_id,
        prod_name,
        q4_2019_sales,
        q4_2020_sales,
        overall_sales,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY overall_sales DESC) AS rn,
        COUNT(*) OVER () AS total_count
    FROM product_ranking
),
top_20_percent AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM top_products
    WHERE rn <= CEIL(total_count * 0.20)
),
city_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        city,
        calendar_quarter_desc,
        SUM(total_sales) AS city_total_sales
    FROM filtered_city_products
    GROUP BY city, calendar_quarter_desc
),
product_city_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        fcp.city,
        fcp.prod_id,
        SUM(CASE WHEN fcp.calendar_quarter_desc = '2019-Q4' THEN fcp.total_sales ELSE 0 END) AS prod_q4_2019_sales,
        SUM(CASE WHEN fcp.calendar_quarter_desc = '2020-Q4' THEN fcp.total_sales ELSE 0 END) AS prod_q4_2020_sales
    FROM filtered_city_products fcp
    GROUP BY fcp.city, fcp.prod_id
),
product_city_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        pts.prod_id,
        pts.prod_name,
        pts.q4_2019_sales,
        pts.q4_2020_sales,
        SUM(pcs.prod_q4_2019_sales) AS city_prod_q4_2019_sales,
        SUM(pcs.prod_q4_2020_sales) AS city_prod_q4_2020_sales,
        SUM(ct.q4_2019_sales) AS city_q4_2019_sales,
        SUM(ct.q4_2020_sales) AS city_q4_2020_sales
    FROM top_20_percent pts
    JOIN product_city_sales pcs ON pts.prod_id = pcs.prod_id
    JOIN city_totals ct ON ct.city = pcs.city
    GROUP BY pts.prod_id, pts.prod_name, pts.q4_2019_sales, pts.q4_2020_sales
)
SELECT 
    pct.prod_name,
    CAST(pct.city_prod_q4_2019_sales AS REAL) / pct.city_q4_2019_sales AS q4_2019_share,
    CAST(pct.city_prod_q4_2020_sales AS REAL) / pct.city_q4_2020_sales AS q4_2020_share,
    (CAST(pct.city_prod_q4_2020_sales AS REAL) / pct.city_q4_2020_sales) - 
    (CAST(pct.city_prod_q4_2019_sales AS REAL) / pct.city_q4_2019_sales) AS share_change
FROM product_city_totals pct
ORDER BY share_change DESC;

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH 
  -- Get Q4 2019 and Q4 2020 sales excluding promotions
  q4_sales AS (
    SELECT 
      c.cust_city,
      p.prod_id,
      t.calendar_quarter_id,
      SUM(s.amount_sold) AS total_sales
    FROM sales s
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN products p ON s.prod_id = p.prod_id
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    WHERE t.calendar_quarter_id IN ('2019-Q4', '2020-Q4')
      AND s.promo_id IS NULL
    GROUP BY c.cust_city, p.prod_id, t.calendar_quarter_id
  ),
  
  -- Aggregate total sales per city for each quarter (excluding promotions)
  city_quarter_sales AS (
    SELECT 
      cust_city,
      calendar_quarter_id,
      SUM(total_sales) AS city_total_sales
    FROM q4_sales
    GROUP BY cust_city, calendar_quarter_id
  ),
  
  -- Compute growth rate for each city from Q4 2019 to Q4 2020
  city_growth AS (
    SELECT 
      c1.cust_city,
      c1.city_total_sales AS q4_2019_sales,
      c2.city_total_sales AS q4_2020_sales,
      CASE 
        WHEN c1.city_total_sales = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE (c2.city_total_sales - c1.city_total_sales) / c1.city_total_sales
      END AS growth_rate
    FROM city_quarter_sales c1
    LEFT JOIN city_quarter_sales c2 
      ON c1.cust_city = c2.cust_city AND c2.calendar_quarter_id = '2020-Q4'
    WHERE c1.calendar_quarter_id = '2019-Q4'
      AND c2.city_total_sales IS NOT NULL
      AND (c2.city_total_sales - c1.city_total_sales) / c1.city_total_sales >= 0.20
  ),
  
  -- Get sales per product in Q4 2019 and Q4 2020 for qualifying cities
  product_sales AS (
    SELECT 
      qs.cust_city,
      qs.prod_id,
      qs.calendar_quarter_id,
      qs.total_sales
    FROM q4_sales qs
    WHERE qs.cust_city IN (SELECT cust_city FROM city_growth)
  ),
  
  -- Compute city-level total sales per quarter (for share calculation)
  city_quarter_totals AS (
    SELECT 
      cust_city,
      calendar_quarter_id,
      SUM(total_sales) AS city_quarter_total
    FROM product_sales
    GROUP BY cust_city, calendar_quarter_id
  ),
  
  -- Compute product-level sales in each quarter for qualifying cities
  product_quarter_totals AS (
    SELECT 
      prod_id,
      calendar_quarter_id,
      SUM(total_sales) AS product_quarter_total
    FROM product_sales
    GROUP BY prod_id, calendar_quarter_id
  ),
  
  -- Combine to compute product sales per quarter
  product_shares AS (
    SELECT 
      pq.prod_id,
      pq.calendar_quarter_id,
      SUM(pq.total_sales) AS product_quarter_total,
      SUM(cqt.city_quarter_total) AS city_quarter_total
    FROM product_sales pq
    JOIN city_quarter_totals cqt 
      ON pq.cust_city = cqt.cust_city AND pq.calendar_quarter_id = cqt.calendar_quarter_id
    GROUP BY pq.prod_id, pq.calendar_quarter_id
  ),
  
  -- Compute share in Q4 2019 and Q4 2020 for each product
  product_shares_by_quarter AS (
    SELECT 
      prod_id,
      MAX(CASE WHEN calendar_quarter_id = '2019-Q4' THEN product_quarter_total * 1.0 / city_quarter_total END) AS share_2019,
      MAX(CASE WHEN calendar_quarter_id = '2020-Q4' THEN product_quarter_total * 1.0 / city_quarter_total END) AS share_2020
    FROM product_shares
    GROUP BY prod_id
  ),
  
  -- Filter to top 20% products by overall sales in Q4 2019 & 2020 (excluding promotions)
  -- Compute total sales per product across both quarters
  product_overall_sales AS (
    SELECT 
      prod_id,
      SUM(CASE WHEN calendar_quarter_id IN ('2019-Q4', '2020-Q4') THEN total_sales ELSE 0 END) AS overall_sales
    FROM product_sales
    GROUP BY prod_id
  ),
  
  -- Rank products by overall sales and select top 20%
  ranked_products AS (
    SELECT 
      prod_id,
      overall_sales,
      NTILE(5) OVER (ORDER BY overall_sales DESC) AS sales_quintile
    FROM product_overall_sales
  ),
  
  -- Join sales with top 20% products
  top_products AS (
    SELECT 
      ps.share_2019,
      ps.share_2020,
      ps.share_2020 - ps.share_2019 AS share_change
    FROM product_shares_by_quarter ps
    JOIN ranked_products rp ON ps.prod_id = rp.prod_id
    WHERE rp.sales_quintile = 1
  )
  
SELECT 
  share_2019,
  share_2020,
  share_change
FROM top_products
ORDER BY share_change DESC;
